# Extension order (on the wire): GREASE, 18(sct), 17613(ALPS), 10(groups), 11(ec_point), 45(psk_ke_modes), 0(SNI), 65037(ECH), 35(session_ticket), 13(sig_algs), 16(ALPN h2/http11), 27(cert_compress brotli), 43(supported_versions GREASE/1.3/1.2), 65281(reneg_info), 23(EMS), 5(status_request OCSP), 51(key_share), GREASE
